sentences.translation: Učitelj je rekao svojim učenicima: «Strpljenje je ključ olakšanja».
sentences.translationEn: The teacher said to his students: «Patience is the key to relief».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الصَّبْرَ يُسَاعِدُنَا عَلَى حَلِّ الْمَشَاكِلِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da nam strpljenje pomaže u rješavanju problema.
sentences.translationEn: This means that patience helps us solve problems.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ أَحْمَدُ يَنْتَظِرُ نَتِيجَةَ الِامْتِحَانِ بِقَلَقٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je s brigom čekao rezultat ispita.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad was anxiously waiting for the exam result.

sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَ الْمَثَلَ وَصَبَرَ حَتَّى جَاءَتِ الْأَخْبَارُ الْجَيِّدَةُ.
sentences.translation: Sjetio se poslovice i strpio se dok nisu stigle dobre vijesti.
sentences.translationEn: He remembered the proverb and was patient until good news came.
